name: StatTile
description: Broker-status metric tile: small label, big preformatted value with optional unit suffix, optional sparkline, subdued no-data state.

props.name: value
props.description: Preformatted display string (SI abbreviation etc. is done by the caller).

props.name: unit
props.description: Subdued suffix rendered after the value, e.g. '/s'.

props.name: kind
props.description: 'number' renders big, tabular, one line; 'text' renders smaller and wraps to two lines. Fed from the tile's valueKind.

props.name: points
props.description: {t, v}[] sparkline samples; omitted or <2 points hides the sparkline.

props.name: noData
props.description: Shows a subdued 'no data yet' placeholder instead of the value.

props.name: deltaPct
props.description: Percentage change across the visible window (last vs first sample). A direction arrow shows only when |deltaPct| >= 2, so steady tiles carry no flicker.

props.name: exact
props.description: Exact, unabbreviated value string for the hover panel; falls back to `value`.

props.name: description
props.description: One-line note shown at the top of the hover panel (e.g. an observed tile's measurement note).

props.name: windowName
props.description: Window the sparkline and delta span; named in the hover panel.

notes: Figma is not linked yet; stories use local fixtures. Sparkline color is set here via text-primary on the wrapper. The tile owns its hover/focus panel (exact value, min/max, window name) so observed tiles no longer need an outer Tooltip wrapper; the panel opens on group-hover and group-focus-within.
